completed_tasks.name: Plan and reference-review the zodiac-wheel rotor

remaining_tasks.name: Create the thin Vite React TypeScript host and static SVG wheel
Implement deterministic staggered reveal and lock feedback
Add drag physics, accessibility, tests, and mobile QA

decisions.decision: Use component-astro-02-rolodex as a visual and sequencing reference, but rewrite its controller and semantic data model.
decisions.rationale: Its concentric SVG layers, fixed index, upright nodes, and staggered locks transfer well; its independently randomized rings do not.

decisions.decision: Resolve every wheel layer from one canonical twelve-sector month index.
decisions.rationale: The month, sign, Hebrew letter, faculty, and outer character must always remain coherent.

decisions.decision: Build the multi-ring reveal before direct drag physics.
decisions.rationale: The immediate goal is to establish the rotor composition and locking sequence first.

uncommitted_files: NoteBookLM Report.md (pre-existing untracked user file; do not stage)
src/ (pre-existing untracked assets and fonts; do not stage wholesale)
next_action: Confirm branch codex/zodiac-wheel-rotors-clean, read .planning/.continue-here.md and the Rolodex reference, then build the thin React/SVG host and static wheel layers before adding motion.
context_notes: This is the wheel-specific handoff. The older codex/zodiac-wheel-rotors branch contains unrelated mobile-flow roadmap commits and must not be used for this task.
